[01 / CREATIVE AGENCY]

We build stunning websites, design professional logos, and develop custom software apps for your business.

From premium logos and visual branding to high-performance front-ends and scalable back-end architecture, we build endless software solutions tailored to elevate your digital presence.

What we deliver

Branding, UI design, development, and launch — crafted as one seamless experience.

Identity Branding
Interface Websites
Systems Apps
1.8s

Fast, clear, and ready.

Interactive preview The interfaces we build are compatible with multiple devices

[ / OUR PROCESS]

A straightforward process with no surprises.

01

Discover

We learn about your brand, audience, goals, and competitive landscape to define the strategic direction.

02

Define

We architect the page structure, user flows, messaging hierarchy, and conversion strategy.

03

Create

We design and develop the full experience — from UI concepts to responsive, performance-optimized code.

04

Launch

We deploy, monitor, and hand over a polished product with everything your team needs to maintain and grow.

SaaS Dashboard

Nova Flow — enterprise analytics interface.

Our goal

Transform a complex data platform into an intuitive, visually compelling dashboard that users trust at first glance.

Our solution

We designed a clean desktop and mobile experience with strong contrast, clear data hierarchy, and seamless navigation.

Result

A sharper product presence that helps buyers evaluate with confidence — even under time pressure.

Premium Commerce

AETHER — luxury audio experience.

Our vision

We built a refined interface for high-end audio equipment that communicates craft, restraint, and uncompromising quality through every pixel.

What we delivered

Immersive product presentation with clear visual hierarchy, premium motion design, and an interactive 3D product viewer that lets buyers explore from every angle.

3D Integration Animation Luxury UI

L

Logo Concepts

Custom wordmarks, symbols, and combination marks tailored to your brand identity.

Color & Typography

Comprehensive palettes, font pairings, and design tokens that define your brand voice.

Brand Applications

Stationery, packaging, brochures, and full corporate identity layouts.

[ / WEB DEVELOPMENT]

Website development packages built for every stage of your business.

From a clean, high-converting brochure site to a fully dynamic platform with admin control — choose the tier that matches your ambition.

Tier 1

Essential

Simple Website

Establish a premium, high-converting digital presence.

20,000 ETB

Timeline: 7 to 10 Days

  • Custom website designs
  • Fully responsive UI for desktop, tablet, and mobile
  • Basic SEO configuration
  • Basic back-end setup and contact handling
  • Includes 3 to 6 months of free maintenance

Tier 2

Most requested

Business Website

Scale your operations with dynamic data and powerful administrative control.

30,000 ETB

Timeline: 10 to 15 Days

  • Everything included in the Simple Website package, plus:
  • Robust, advanced SEO strategy
  • Deep Google Analytics integration
  • Custom Admin Panel
  • Dedicated product management or inventory systems
  • Fully dynamic content delivery (CMS)
  • Enhanced visual animations and 3D effects
  • Includes 3 to 6 months of free maintenance

Tier 3

Premium

Custom Solutions

Tailor-made software built to solve your unique business challenges.

Contact Us
  • Custom web application and mobile software engineering
  • Deep integration with third-party APIs and legacy systems
  • Specialized technical consulting and architecture design
  • Scalable infrastructure
  • Includes 3 to 6 months of free maintenance

[ / LOGO & BRANDING]

Brand identity packages that make your business unforgettable.

From a distinct logo mark to a complete corporate identity ecosystem — every brand starts with a strong visual foundation.

Tier 1

Essential

Logo Design

Establish a distinct, professional visual mark for your business.

15,000 ETB

Timeline: 3 to 5 Days

  • Custom, premium logo design
  • Essential file formats for digital and print use
  • Includes free consultation and discovery chat to review your idea

Tier 2

Most requested

Semi-Branding

Expand your visual footprint with core business and marketing assets.

20,000 ETB

Timeline: 5 to 7 Days

  • Everything included in the Logo Design package, plus:
  • Professional business card design
  • Flyer design
  • Official company stamp design
  • Professional letterhead template
  • Custom brand patterns
  • Includes free consultation and discovery chat to review your idea

Tier 3

Premium

Full Branding

A comprehensive, premium corporate identity ecosystem built to scale.

30,000 ETB

Timeline: 7 to 10 Days

  • Everything included in the Semi-Branding package, plus:
  • Complete logo variations (primary, secondary, sub-marks)
  • Dynamic logo animation / intro
  • Corporate brochure design
  • Product packaging design
  • Complete Company Profile document layout
  • Corporate ID card design
  • Includes free consultation and discovery chat to review your idea

Project Terms & Policies

✧

Free Consultation

We offer free reviews and exploratory chats upfront to see what your idea is before we design.

⟐

Payment Milestones

A 50% advance payment is required to initiate the project. The remaining 50% balance will be held and paid after the final project is handed over.

✦

Post-Launch Support

Every package comes with 3 to 6 months of free maintenance. After that, any additional features or updates will be subject to additional fees.
